title: Palantir Foundry Center of Excellence
description: Established and led the Palantir Foundry Center of Excellence enabling AI and advanced analytics use cases across the enterprise. Built governance framework, trained teams, and delivered enterprise-scale data applications.

title: Snowflake + dbt Modern Data Platform
description: Architected and deployed a modern cloud-native data platform using Snowflake and dbt. Enabled self-service analytics for cross-functional teams supporting Land Acquisition, Development, Construction, Customer Care, and Finance.

title: Self-Service BI Platform
description: Designed and implemented a cloud-based self-service BI platform enabling business users to create their own reports and dashboards. Reduced dependency on analytics team and cut labor costs while improving decision velocity.

title: Predictive Analytics for Labor Cost Reduction
description: Built predictive models and automation workflows to forecast staffing needs and optimize labor allocation. Delivered prescriptive recommendations to business leaders, resulting in significant cost avoidance and improved workforce efficiency.
